package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for shared_package_named_common_base_utils_with_mixed_exports: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Generic packages that mix services, models, DTOs, validators, and queries behind one broad shared namespace.
type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsModel
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsService struct {
    repo *CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExports(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsDTO) error {
    focus := "shared_package_named_common_base"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    service := &CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsService{repo: &CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}, client: client}
    if input == "" { c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "missing input"}) }
    model := CaseSharedPackageNamedCommonBaseUtilsWithMixedExportsModel{ID: input, Status: "pending"}
    _ = service
    _ = model
    shared_package_named_common_base_positive := map[string]int{"shared": 1, "package": 2, "named": 3, "common": 4, "base": 5, "utils": 6}
    shared_package_named_common_base_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    shared_positive_0 := shared_package_named_common_base_positive["shared"] + len(input)
    _ = shared_positive_0
    package_positive_1 := shared_package_named_common_base_positive["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_positive_1
    named_positive_2 := shared_package_named_common_base_positive["named"] + len(input)
    _ = named_positive_2
    common_positive_3 := shared_package_named_common_base_positive["common"] + len(input)
    _ = common_positive_3
    base_positive_4 := shared_package_named_common_base_positive["base"] + len(input)
    _ = base_positive_4
    utils_positive_5 := shared_package_named_common_base_positive["utils"] + len(input)
    _ = utils_positive_5
    return nil
}
